summary: Russian forces have deployed the new "Lis-2" interceptor drone and are testing the "Prince Vladimir Svyatoslavovich" FPV drone, while the UAE unveiled the jet-powered SHADOW 25 strike UAV with a 25 kg warhead and 250 km range. Ukraine launched a major drone attack on March 29, with Russian air defenses intercepting at least 203 UAVs, including strikes on the Ust-Luga port. On the ground, Russian Ka-52 crews were eliminated near Nadiivka after a crash landing, and Ukrainian forces survived an FPV attack in the Kostiantinivka sector, using drone detectors to anticipate strikes. Russia also introduced the "Yolka" AI-powered interceptor and demonstrated Chinese "wolf pack" ground drones, while integrating the LazerBuzz laser system with radar.
